description: capital and the largest city of Somalia
description_wiki: Mogadishu, locally known as Xamar or Hamar, is the capital and most populous city of Somalia.
Somalia, officially the Federal Republic of Somalia, is the easternmost country in continental Africa.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: African-American abolitionist and women's rights activist (1797–1883)
description_wiki: Sojourner Truth (; born Isabella Bomefree; c. 1797 – November 26, 1883) was an American abolitionist and activist for African-American civil rights, women's rights, and alcohol temperance.

description: founding Father and first U.S. president; soldier and slave owner (1732–1799)
description_wiki: George Washington (February 22, 1732 [O.S. February 11, 1731] – December 14, 1799) was a Founding Father and the first president of the United States, serving from 1789 to 1797.

description: 1861–1865 civil war in the United States between the North and the South over the enslavement of African-Americans
description_wiki: The American Civil War (April 12, 1861 – May 26, 1865; also known by other names) was a civil war in the United States between the Union ("the North") and the Confederacy ("the South"), which was formed in 1861 by states that had seceded from the Union to preserve slavery in the United States, which they saw as threatened because of the election of Abraham Lincoln and the growing abolitionist movement in the North.

description: American hymn composed in 1905 commonly known as the Black national anthem
description_wiki: "Lift Every Voice and Sing" is a hymn with lyrics by James Weldon Johnson (1871–1938) written in the late 1800s and set to music by his brother, J. Rosamond Johnson (1873–1954) in 1905.

aliases: anthem of the United States of America
description: national anthem of the United States of America
description_wiki: "The Star-Spangled Banner" is the national anthem of the United States.

surface_forms: Somalia was going through a civil war
description: civil war taking place in Somalia since 1991
description_wiki: The Somali Civil War (Somali: Dagaalkii Sokeeye ee Soomaaliya; Arabic: الحرب الأهلية الصومالية al-ḥarb al-’ahliyya aṣ-ṣūmāliyya) is an ongoing civil war that is taking place in Somalia.
